name: Property Manager
description: Property CRUD and management screens including property list, detail view, create/edit forms, and unit management.

page_briefs.list: Property grid showing property cards with thumbnail image, address, unit count, occupancy badge, and monthly revenue. Search and filter controls above the grid.
page_briefs.detail: Property detail view with hero image, address, description, and key stats. Tabbed sections below for units, financials, and maintenance. Map embed in the sidebar.
page_briefs.create: Multi-step property creation form with address fields, property type selector, photo upload area, unit configuration, and financial defaults.
page_briefs.units: Unit grid showing unit cards with unit number, floor plan type, square footage, rent amount, and occupancy status badge. Add-unit button above the grid.
page_briefs.unit-detail: Unit detail view with floor plan info, current tenant card if occupied, lease summary, rent history table, and maintenance ticket list.
page_briefs.documents: Property document vault showing leases, inspection reports, insurance certificates, and uploaded files. Folder navigation on the left, document list in the center, and preview or metadata on the right.
